claim_boundary: This intake packet is an owner handoff checklist. It does not create human observation evidence and does not make the PM UX release area pass until the observation report passes.

field_rows.owner_note: Observation source must explicitly opt into release evidence, not remain draft or template-only.
Participant must be new to the product workflow being released.
Do not use expert/operator rehearsals as PM UX release-area evidence.
Must identify the exact sample project completed by the participant.
field_rows.required_value: sample project identifier used in the observed workflow

field_rows.owner_note: Scope should match the paid-pilot workflow promised to customers.
field_rows.required_value: observed workflow scope covering the full five-step workflow
field_rows.template_value: OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: Import, Model Health, Analysis Setup, Run & Monitor, Compare & Report

field_rows.owner_note: Each required workflow step must have a human-observed pass/outcome signal.
field_rows.required_value: all five steps observed and passed: Import, Model Health, Analysis Setup, Run & Monitor, Compare & Report
field_rows.template_value: [{"id": "import", "label": "Import", "outcome": "OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: pass"}, {"id": "model_health", "label": "Model Health", "outcome": "OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: pass"}, {"id": "analysis_setup", "label": "Analysis Setup", "outcome": "OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: pass"}, {"id": "run_monitor", "label": "Run & Monitor", "outcome": "OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: pass"}, {"id": "compare_report", "label": "Compare & Report", "outcome": "OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: pass"}]

field_rows.owner_note: Automated browser smoke tests do not satisfy this field.
field_rows.required_value: human observer or UX research owner
field_rows.template_value: OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: UX research owner or human observer

field_rows.owner_note: Use a timezone-aware ISO-8601 timestamp with Z or an explicit UTC offset.
Use a timezone-aware ISO-8601 timestamp with Z or an explicit UTC offset.
Completion time must prove the PM 30-minute UX gate and match wall-clock timestamps.
field_rows.template_value: OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: wall-clock minutes matching completed_at_utc - started_at_utc, numeric <= 30.0

field_rows.owner_note: Blocking usability issues keep the UX release area blocked.
Reference the observation note, ticket, recording, or signed evidence bundle.
field_rows.template_value: OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: observation note, ticket, recording, or signed evidence bundle

field_rows.owner_note: Decision must explicitly accept the observation for release evidence.
field_rows.template_value: OWNER_INPUT_REQUIRED: accepted | approved | pass | signed | approved_for_release

field_rows.owner_note: Completion timestamp must not precede the observed start timestamp.
The PM 30-minute gate is enforced from parsed wall-clock timestamps.
Declared completion_minutes must match computed elapsed minutes within the report tolerance.
The observed task must cover Import through Compare & Report without skipped steps.
Template workflow step placeholders must be replaced with real observed outcomes.
field_rows.required_value: no placeholder workflow step labels or outcomes

field_rows.owner_note: The 30-minute sample must point to a retrievable note, ticket, recording, or signed bundle.
field_rows.required_value: https URL, ticket/jira/ux/user-study reference, or existing local evidence path

field_rows.owner_note: Self-references do not prove that separate human-observation evidence exists.
field_rows.required_value: evidence_ref must not point back to the observation JSON itself

field_rows.owner_note: Templates are owner input aids, not human observation evidence.
field_rows.required_value: evidence_ref must not point to the UX observation template

summary.owner_action: Attach a human new-user observation record for the sample project workflow, including participant status, observer, all five workflow steps (Import, Model Health, Analysis Setup, Run & Monitor, Compare & Report), timezone-aware start/end timestamps, wall-clock completion minutes, blocker count, evidence reference, and accepted release decision.

summary_line: UX new-user observation intake: BLOCKED | fields=0/21 | blockers=12
